ddls:
CREATE TABLE "risk_assessment" (
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the risk assessment */,
  "intercept" REAL /* Intercept value for the assessment model */,
  "population" REAL /* Total population */,
  "perc_65yrs" REAL /* Percentage of the population aged 65 years or older */,
  "perc_minority" REAL /* Percentage of minority population */,
  "perc_black" REAL /* Percentage of black population */,
  "perc_hispanic" REAL /* Percentage of Hispanic population */,
  "perc_poverty" REAL /* Percentage of population living in poverty */,
  "perc_urban_pop" REAL /* Percentage of urban population */,
  "income" REAL /* Average income level */,
  "risk_flu" REAL /* Risk level for flu outbreaks */,
  "urban_risk" REAL /* Urban risk level */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the location */,
  "geographic_area" TEXT /* Detailed description of the geographic area */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density in the area */,
  "vaccination_rate" REAL /* Percentage of the population that is vaccinated */,
  "hospital_capacity" REAL /* Available hospital capacity */,
  "emergency_preparedness" TEXT /* Level of emergency preparedness */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_assessment_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES population_data ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic factor */,
  "demo_name" TEXT /* Name of the demographic factor */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the demographic factor */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group (e.g., 0-18, 19-64, 65+) */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity (e.g., Asian, Black, Hispanic) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender (e.g., Male, Female, Non-binary) */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level (e.g., High School, College, Graduate) */,
  "health_conditions" TEXT /* Prevalent health conditions (e.g., Diabetes, Heart Disease) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "socioeconomic_factors" (
  "socio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each socioeconomic factor */,
  "socio_name" TEXT /* Name of the socioeconomic factor */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the socioeconomic factor */,
  "employment_rate" REAL /* Employment rate in the area */,
  "housing_conditions" TEXT /* Quality of housing (e.g., Good, Poor) */,
  "access_to_healthcare" TEXT /* Availability and accessibility of healthcare services */,
  "food_security" TEXT /* Level of food security (e.g., High, Low) */,
  "public_transportation" TEXT /* Quality and availability of public transportation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("socio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_risks" (
  "risk_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health risk */,
  "risk_name" TEXT /* Name of the health risk */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the health risk */,
  "disease_type" TEXT /* Type of disease (e.g., Flu, Ebola, Zika) */,
  "transmission_rate" REAL /* Rate of disease transmission */,
  "mortality_rate" REAL /* Mortality rate associated with the disease */,
  "infection_rate" REAL /* Rate of new infections */,
  "recovery_rate" REAL /* Recovery rate of the population */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("risk_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_data" (
  "population_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population data entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the population data */,
  "total_population" REAL /* Total population */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the location */,
  "geographic_area" TEXT /* Detailed description of the geographic area */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density in the area */,
  "age_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of the population by age group */,
  "gender_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of the population by gender */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("population_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., public health official, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or division of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  "status" TEXT /* Account status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the risk assessment data accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download, analysis) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (browser and device information) */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the location */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_date FOREIGN KEY ("date") REFERENCES risk_assessment ("date"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES population_data ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk report */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the risk assessment findings */,
  "recommendations" TEXT /* Recommended interventions based on the findings */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the location */,
  "geographic_area" TEXT /* Detailed description of the geographic area */,
  "target_population" TEXT /* Target population for the interventions */,
  "implementation_plan" TEXT /* Plan for implementing the recommended interventions */,
  "follow_up_date" TEXT /* Follow-up date for evaluating the effectiveness of the interventions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_reports_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES population_data ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_reports_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_reports_date FOREIGN KEY ("date") REFERENCES risk_assessment ("date")
)
